comments.text:
Well done 👍 , I am 85 years old, and if my memory served right? I took my last subject in my material units in History , name The Brief History of India and Pakistan. I will be very honest to say I am very young then, I did tried my best why Pakistan has to split from India. What my understanding has something to do on how far the people will have to walked miles to get Water from India . Correct if me please if yes.  I do not know the rest . shame on me. I have been reading the kind of life these people had endured since then. They are proud people who have survived what nature can offer them . I really admired the people and love their good food which is famous around the world. 
Thank you for the nice and interesting video . From the 🇵🇭🇵🇭🇵🇭🇵🇭❤❤
